toggle visual property in all viewports specified by the mask Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;toggleVisualizeProperty.

set all visualize properties masks Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;setAllVisualizeProperties.

set all object solid colors (front/back/etc.) from other object for all viewports Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;copyAllSolidColors.

if false deactivates clipped-by-plane for this object and all of its parents, otherwise sets clipped-by-plane for this this object only Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;setGlobalClippedByPlane. Parameter viewportMask defaults to ViewportMask.all().

memberdef.argsstring: (in MR.Color color, bool selected, MR._InOpt_ViewportId viewportId=default)
memberdef.name: setFrontColor

briefdescription.para: sets color of object when it is selected/not-selected (depending on argument) in given viewport Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;setFrontColor. Parameter viewportId defaults to {}.

sets color of object when it is selected/not-selected (depending on argument) in all viewports Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;setFrontColorsForAllViewports. Parameter selected defaults to true.

sets backward color of object in all viewports Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;setBackColorsForAllViewports.

sets backward color of object in given viewport Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;setBackColor. Parameter viewportId defaults to {}.

sets global transparency alpha of object in given viewport Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;setGlobalAlpha. Parameter viewportId defaults to {}.

sets global transparency alpha of object in all viewports Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;setGlobalAlphaForAllViewports.
sets some dirty flags for the object (to force its visual update)

parameterdescription.para: is a union of DirtyFlags flags

whether to automatically invalidate model caches (pass false here if you manually update the caches) Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;setDirtyFlags. Parameter invalidateCaches defaults to true.

briefdescription.para: sets the object as can/cannot be picked (by mouse) in all of given viewports Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;setPickable. Parameter viewportMask defaults to ViewportMask.all().

sets coloring mode of the object with given argument Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;setColoringType.

sets shininess visual value of the object with given argument Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;setShininess.

sets intensity of reflections Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;setSpecularStrength.

sets intensity of non-directional light Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;setAmbientStrength.

set whether the scene-related properties should get their values from SceneColors and SceneSettings instances rather than from the input data on deserialization Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;setUseDefaultScenePropertiesOnDeserialization.

reset basic object colors to their default values from the current theme Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;resetFrontColor.

reset all object colors to their default values from the current theme Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;resetColors.

Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;setName.

modifies xfs for all viewports at once Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;setXfsForAllViewports.

Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;setWorldXf. Parameter id defaults to {}.

scale object size (all point positions) Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;applyScale.

if true sets all predecessors visible, otherwise sets this object invisible Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;setGlobalVisibility. Parameter viewportMask defaults to ViewportMask.any().

Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;setLocked.

Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;setParentLocked.

removes this from its parent children list returns false if it was already orphan Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;detachFromParent.

adds given object at the end of children (recognized or not); returns false if it was already child of this, of if given pointer is empty; child object will always report this as parent after the call;

parameterdescription.para: if set to false then child object will be excluded from children() and it will be stored by weak_ptr Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;addChild. Parameter recognizedChild defaults to true.

briefdescription.para: adds given object in the recognized children before existingChild; if newChild was already among this children then moves it just before existingChild keeping the order of other children intact; returns false if newChild is nullptr, or existingChild is not a child of this Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;addChildBefore.

detaches all recognized children from this, keeping all unrecognized ones Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;removeAllChildren.

sort recognized children by name Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;sortChildren.

selects the object, returns true if value changed, otherwise returns false Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;select.

ancillary object is an object hidden (in scene menu) from a regular user such objects cannot be selected, and if it has been selected, it is unselected when turn ancillary Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;setAncillary.

sets the object visible in the viewports specified by the mask (by default in all viewports) Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;setVisible. Parameter viewportMask defaults to ViewportMask.all().

specifies object visibility as bitmask of viewports Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;setVisibilityMask.

swaps this object with other note: do not swap object signals, so listeners will get notifications from swapped object requires implementation of swapBase_ and swapSignals_ (if type has signals) Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;swap.

adds tag to the object's tag storage additionally calls ObjectTagManager::tagAddedSignal NOTE: tags starting with a dot are considered as service ones and might be hidden from UI Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;addTag.

removes tag from the object's tag storage additionally calls ObjectTagManager::tagRemovedSignal Generated from method MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;removeTag.

Generated from class MR::AddVisualProperties&lt;MR.FeatureObject, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::diameter, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::angle, MR::DimensionsVisualizePropertyType::length&gt;. Base classes: Direct: (non-virtual) MR.FeatureObject Indirect: (non-virtual) MR.ObjectChildrenHolder MR.Object MR.VisualObject Derived classes: Direct: (non-virtual) MR.ConeObject This is the non-const half of the class.
